zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Lisle於1339年出生在英國越可爾維頓時，她的父親John de Lisle22歲，母親Maud de Grey20歲。她於1353年與Sir William Aldebrough在英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1378年在英國越可爾享年39歲，埋葬在英國越可爾阿爾德布盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Lisle于1339年出生在英国越可爾維頓时，她的父亲John de Lisle22岁，母亲Maud de Grey20岁。她于1353年与Sir William Aldebrough在英国英格兰越可爾希亞活结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1378年在英国越可爾享年39岁，埋葬在英国越可爾阿爾德布盧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Lisle was born in 1339, in Weeton, Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Lisle, was 22 and her mother, Maud de Grey, was 20. She married Sir William Aldebrough in 1353, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1378, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Aldbrough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Lisle est née en 1339, à Weeton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Lisle, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Maud de Grey, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Aldebrough en 1353, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1378, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Aldbrough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Lisle 1339 in Weeton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Lisle 22 und ihre Mutter Maud de Grey 20. Sie hat 1353 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Aldebrough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1378 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Aldbrough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Lisle è nata il nel 1339 nel Weeton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Lisle, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Maud de Grey, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Aldebrough nel 1353, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1378, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Aldbrough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Lisleが1339年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィートンで生まれた時，父John de Lisleは22歳，母Maud de Greyは20歳であった。1353年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドでSir William Aldebroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1378年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで39歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアアルドブロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Lisle(이)가 1339년 영국 요르크실르 위턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Lisle(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Grey(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하레우드에서 Sir William Aldebrough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1378년 영국 요르크실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 알드브루그h에 묻혔다.

mn.Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: Harewood, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Lisle nasceu em 1339, em Weeton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Lisle, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Grey, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Aldebrough em 1353, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1378, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Aldbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Lisle родилась в 1339 г. в местности витон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Lisle было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Grey, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Aldebrough в 1353 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1378 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности алдброую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Lisle nació en 1339, en Weeton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Lisle, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Maud de Grey, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir William Aldebrough en 1353, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1378, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Aldbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
